Off Calendar Feb-03-2026 Continued To Mar-02-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY, Appointment Under IAEA
Off Calendar Jan-29-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Marissa C. Smith, Esq., for Isabel Go, Petitioner.

At the outset, the court states that it finds that the presumption under Probate Code 6124 does not arise. The court asks if there are any appearances to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Lost Will and for Letters Testamentary. The Lost will dated Nov-06-1998 is admitted to probate. Isabel Go is appointed Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Amy Harrington is appointed probate Referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status hearing on filing either a petition for order for final distribution or a petition for approval of report of status of administration pursuant to Prob. Code Sec. 12200 et seq. is set for Feb-03-2026 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is filed two weeks prior, the status hearing will be taken off calendar.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not Reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY, Appointment Under IAEA
Off Calendar Dec-30-2024 Continued To Jan-29-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY, Appointment Under IAEA
Off Calendar Nov-25-2024 Continued To Dec-30-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Jun-10-2024 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Marissa Smith appeared by zoom for Isabel Go (petitioner).

The court stated that it doesn't have many options and that no legal authority has been given to support transfer of the asset to Mrs. Go. Mrs. Smith stated that she filed the petition in hopes of saving her client the time and expense of a petition for probate. The Petition for Spousal Property is denied.

Judge: Cecilia Castellanos. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Malone/Santos. Not reported.
